'''gahushu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:avatrombopag|avatrombopag]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| g-h-sh
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:avatrombopag|avatrombopag]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| gahushu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:gæhishith|gæhishith]] || [[word:gæhishij|gæhishij]] || [[word:gæhishish|gæhishish]] || [[word:gæhishi|gæhishi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:gahuhushuth|gahuhushuth]] || [[word:gahuhushuj|gahuhushuj]] || [[word:gahuhushush|gahuhushush]] || [[word:gahuhushu|gahuhushu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:gahushuth|gahushuth]] || [[word:gahushuj|gahushuj]] || [[word:gahushush|gahushush]] || [[word:gahushu|gahushu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:gahufshuth|gahufshuth]] || [[word:gahufshuj|gahufshuj]] || [[word:gahufshush|gahufshush]] || [[word:gahufshuf|gahufshuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:gahushuthu|gahushuthu]] || [[word:gahushuju|gahushuju]] || [[word:gahushushu|gahushushu]] || [[word:gahushuku|gahushuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:gahushuth|gahushuth]] || [[word:gahushuj|gahushuj]] || [[word:gahushush|gahushush]] || [[word:gahushu|gahushu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:gahushuthul|gahushuthul]] || [[word:gahushujul|gahushujul]] || [[word:gahushushul|gahushushul]] || [[word:gahushukul|gahushukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:gahushuthuthu|gahushuthuthu]] || [[word:gahushujuju|gahushujuju]] || [[word:gahushushushu|gahushushushu]] || [[word:gahushuku|gahushuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:gahushuthun|gahushuthun]] || [[word:gahushujun|gahushujun]] || [[word:gahushushun|gahushushun]] || [[word:gahushukun|gahushukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:gahushuthuoro|gahushuthuoro]] || [[word:gahushujuoro|gahushujuoro]] || [[word:gahushushuoro|gahushushuoro]] || [[word:gahushukuoro|gahushukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|718161e}}
